name: Reverberation
descs:
Turn End: Inflict 2 [Binding] to enemies (for Abnormalities, their Parts) with 10+ [Vibration] Potency.

If the target has 20+ [Vibration] Potency, apply 2 [Binding] and 1 [Paralysis] instead.

Turn End: Inflict 2 [Binding] and 2 [DefenseDown] to enemies (for Abnormalities, their Parts) with 8+ [Vibration] Potency.

If the target has 15+ [Vibration] Potency, apply 2 [Binding], 1 [Paralysis], and 2 [DefenseDown] instead.

Turn End: Inflict 2 [Binding] and 3 [DefenseDown] to enemies (for Abnormalities, their Parts) with 5+ [Vibration] Potency.

If the target has 10+ [Vibration] Potency, apply 2 [Binding], 1 [Paralysis], and 4 [DefenseDown] instead.
